project.goal: A controlled autonomous coding system: Planner -> Executor -> Reviewer loop driven by an autonomous controller, with mid-flight cancel, subprocess tree-kill, per-task execution trace, and optional confirm on irreversible ops. Local-first via Ollama; OpenRouter optional.

modules.ai.rs: Planner/Executor/Reviewer streaming loop, run_chat_turn reusable by controller
modules.cancel.rs: CancelToken primitive + CancelReason enum (User/Goal/Timeout/CircuitOpen), async cancelled() future, link_from() propagator
modules.controller.rs: start_goal top-level autonomous loop; plan -> execute -> review -> retry -> archive; enforces task/goal timeouts and circuit breaker
modules.fs_ops.rs: path sandbox (resolve strips leading separators, walks .. virtually, canonicalizes, rejects escapes)
modules.memory.rs: atomic temp-file + rename PROJECT_MEMORY.json writes, size ceiling 4 MiB, schema_version = 2, migrate_memory()
modules.project_scan.rs: languages / entry points / configs / deps / workspace detection
modules.settings.rs: Settings struct (persisted to OS config dir), get_settings/save_settings commands
modules.tasks.rs: TaskTree with bounded per-task Trace, persistence to memory, emit helpers for task:* events
modules.tools.rs: read_file/write_file/list_dir/run_cmd with gating (deny-list, allow-list, confirm modal, autonomous_confirm_irreversible), subprocess tree-kill (process_group on Unix, CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP on Windows, SIGTERM->SIGKILL escalation)
modules.trace.rs: bounded Trace schema (MAX_ENTRIES=256, per-string caps), ReviewVerdict
modules.watcher.rs: debounced notify file watcher, emits fs:changed

ai_layer.fallback_policy: If planner fails or OPENROUTER_API_KEY missing, executor handles end-to-end.

settings_surface.max_iterations: u32 executor-loop cap per turn (default: 8, hard ceiling 16)
settings_surface.cmd_confirm_required: boolean (default: true) — gate run_cmd via confirm modal when not allow-listed
settings_surface.cmd_allow_list: Vec<String> of command prefixes auto-approved without modal
settings_surface.autonomous_mode: boolean (default: false) — controller runs without user intervention between tasks
settings_surface.retry_backoff_base_ms: u64 exponential backoff base (default: 1000; capped at 30s)
settings_surface.max_parallel_tasks: u32 (default: 1; scaffold for future parallel runs)
settings_surface.autonomous_confirm_irreversible: boolean (default: false) — forces confirm modal on write_file (existing-file changes) and run_cmd even when autonomous_mode=true

tauri_commands.name: list_dir
tauri_commands.description: Recursive shallow listing of a directory.

tauri_commands.name: read_file
tauri_commands.description: Read a UTF-8 file under the opened project root.

tauri_commands.name: write_file
tauri_commands.description: Write a UTF-8 file under the opened project root. Returns diff.

tauri_commands.name: watch_dir
tauri_commands.description: Start a recursive notify watcher; emits fs:changed events.

tauri_commands.name: run_cmd
tauri_commands.description: Run a short shell command inside the opened project root (direct UI terminal).

tauri_commands.name: send_chat
tauri_commands.description: Send a user message through the hybrid multi-agent loop (planner -> executor -> reviewer).

tauri_commands.name: cancel_chat
tauri_commands.description: Cancel the active chat loop; propagates CancelReason::User through the token.

tauri_commands.name: get_settings
tauri_commands.description: Read persisted settings (api keys, models, base urls, safety, limits).

tauri_commands.name: save_settings
tauri_commands.description: Write persisted settings to the app config directory.

tauri_commands.name: load_memory
tauri_commands.description: Load PROJECT_MEMORY.json from the opened project root.

tauri_commands.name: save_memory
tauri_commands.description: Save PROJECT_MEMORY.json into the opened project root (atomic).

tauri_commands.name: check_planner
tauri_commands.description: Health check: OpenRouter reachable with a key.

tauri_commands.name: start_goal
tauri_commands.description: Autonomous: plan goal -> run tasks sequentially -> review/retry -> archive.

tauri_commands.name: cancel_goal
tauri_commands.description: Cooperatively cancel the top-level autonomous goal loop; CancelReason::Goal.

tauri_commands.name: scan_project_cmd
tauri_commands.description: Scan the project (languages, entry points, configs, deps) and persist project_map.

tauri_commands.name: load_task_tree
tauri_commands.description: Load the most-recently-persisted active task tree from PROJECT_MEMORY.json.

tool_schema.name: read_file
tool_schema.description: Read a text file relative to the opened project root.

tool_schema.name: write_file
tool_schema.description: Write a text file relative to the opened project root. Overwrites. Destructive-write gate uses fs_ops::resolve so leading-slash paths cannot bypass autonomous_confirm_irreversible.

tool_schema.name: list_dir
tool_schema.description: List files in a directory relative to the opened project root.

tool_schema.name: run_cmd
tool_schema.description: Run a short shell command inside the opened project root. Children spawn in a new process group; cancel tears down the whole tree.

trace_schema.bounded_by: MAX_ENTRIES = 256, truncated flag flips true once exceeded
trace_schema.per_string_cap: 4 KiB per user/system/planner/executor/reviewer message; tool outputs and diffs capped similarly
trace_schema.persistence: Attached to each Task; persisted inside active_task_tree and task_history[] on every task:update and on goal completion.

cancel_behavior.mid_sse: stream_openrouter and stream_ollama wrap stream.next() in tokio::select! against cancel.cancelled(); drop reader + return Err(cancelled:<reason>)
cancel_behavior.mid_subprocess: run_cmd_impl races cancel.cancelled() vs child.wait(); on cancel, process-group signal escalation (SIGTERM -> 200ms grace -> SIGKILL on Unix; child.kill() -> taskkill /T /F sweep on Windows)
cancel_behavior.subprocess_tree_kill: Children spawn with process_group(0) on Unix / CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP on Windows; grandchildren killed by pgid/job. Verified by shell-parent-forks-sleep-60& grandchild test.
cancel_behavior.reason_preservation: error string is computed inside the cancel arm, not before the select!, so the reason reaches the caller even under multi-cancel races (PR #7 fix)

delivery_status.phase_summary: Controlled autonomous system complete: mid-flight cancel (SSE + subprocess), subprocess tree-kill, typed CancelReason, per-task execution trace, optional confirm for irreversible ops, bounded execution (timeouts/retries/circuit-breaker), sandbox-enforced writes (single fs_ops::resolve everywhere).

pr_2.title: desktop: streaming + reviewer agent + cmd safety + richer memory

pr_4.title: desktop: audit + harden autonomous task engine (retries, backoff, timeouts, circuit breaker)

pr_5.title: desktop: thread CancellationToken through tool + AI loop for mid-execution cancel

pr_6.title: desktop: CancelReason enum + subprocess tree-kill (pgid at spawn, TERM->KILL escalation)

pr_7.title: desktop: preserve CancelReason across run_cmd select! (addresses PR #6 Devin Review)

pr_8.title: desktop: per-task execution trace (bounded transcript + UI)

pr_9.title: desktop: drop duplicate trace.push_assistant at end of run_chat_turn (addresses PR #8 Devin Review)

pr_10.title: desktop: autonomous_confirm_irreversible setting — force confirm modal for irreversible ops

pr_11.title: desktop: fix write-gate path bypass in autonomous_confirm_irreversible (addresses PR #10 Devin Review)

paused: Per-goal cost accounting (#4 in the original follow-up queue): local-first, not a real requirement right now. No code landed; no cost.rs module exists in tree.
optional_follow_ups: Structured planner JSON schema enforced at Ollama side
Memory compaction when task_history approaches 4 MiB (currently count-capped at 200)
Multi-file diff viewer in Execution pane

notes: Rust rewrites this file on every chat turn via memory::save (atomic temp-file + rename + fsync).
Do not hand-edit during a session; edits will be overwritten.
schema_version = 2. Older files are migrated by memory::migrate_memory() on read.
Every goal-driven task carries its own bounded Trace (trace.rs). See trace_schema.
